stemHtml: Maintaining directional control with one engine inoperative using the banking method, compared to the wings-level method, can result in directional control problems at...

options.a: light aeroplane masses, due to the reduced lateral component of weight.
options.b: heavy aeroplane masses, due to the increased stall speed.
options.c: heavy aeroplane masses, due to the increased lift and drag.
options.d: light aeroplane masses, due to the reduced lateral component of drag.
